narrative:
Precinct Coal I (precinct in Jackson County) has 225 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
